evals.expected_output: Morning workflow: scan today's calendar, handle new accounts, process outstanding items from previous days
expectations: Config read and calendar_configured checked
Mode forced to morning
Current date and day of week determined
/sales-calendar invoked with no arguments (defaults to today in morning)
Unrecognized external meetings trigger /sales-create-account for each new company
New accounts get URL-paste checklist items in daily note (NOT auto-processed)
Past daily note entries with unchecked items processed: Gong scan, summarize, Salesforce push
Accounts missing salesforce_opportunity or gong_url URLs skipped (not auto-processed)
Multiple accounts processed in parallel via subagents
Report shows calendar setup count, catch-up actions, and pending items needing user URLs

evals.expected_output: Evening workflow: process today's meetings, scan tomorrow's calendar, handle new accounts
expectations: Mode forced to evening
Today's daily note read for unchecked deal meeting items
/sales-gong scan run for accounts with unchecked Gong transcript items
/sales-summarize-account run for accounts with unchecked summarize items
/sales-salesforce run for accounts with unchecked Salesforce items
/sales-calendar tomorrow invoked to set up tomorrow's meetings
Unrecognized external meetings handled with /sales-create-account
Report shows today's processing results and tomorrow's calendar setup

evals.expected_output: Evening workflow plus weekly review triggered by Friday detection
expectations: Day of week detected as Friday (5) with evening mode
run_weekly flag set to true
Normal evening workflow runs first
/sales-weekly runs AFTER all daily processing completes
Weekly review summary included in final report

evals.expected_output: Warns about missing calendar config but continues with non-calendar steps
expectations: calendar_configured is not true in config
Warning issued: 'Google Calendar is not configured'
Calendar scan skipped
Outstanding items from previous days still processed
Does NOT stop execution

evals.expected_output: Skips Gong imports when Playwright CLI is not configured
expectations: playwright_configured is not true in config
Gong import steps skipped for all accounts
Report notes: 'Gong imports skipped: Playwright CLI not configured'
Other steps (summarize, Salesforce) still run normally
